message:
feat(ast,core): AST and connection improvements with WAL staging verification updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,6 +107,11 @@ echo "artifact_dir=${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
 
 emit_event "bootstrap" "running" "verification started"
 
+run_compile_step \
+    "wal_unit" \
+    "running bead-scoped WAL lane-stager unit coverage" \
+    cargo test -p fsqlite-wal lane_stager -- --nocapture
+
 run_compile_step \
     "pager_unit" \
     "running bead-scoped pager unit coverage" \
